description: Gigachad (GIGA) emerged in 2024 on Solana as a cult meme built on the iconic “Gigachad” aesthetic, rising through bold culture, viral humor, and strong community energy. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 GIGA gives GIGA holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning GIGA into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Gigachad
